speaker: speaker1
text: Hello . This is Mrs . Wilson . I'd like to buy a new car . Could you offer me a new type of the car , please ?

speaker: speaker1
text: A new car . And I've got a small family , two children , and I haven't got a lot of money and ...

speaker: speaker2
text: Oh , oh , Madam , Madam , I'm afraid you have the wrong number .

speaker: speaker1
text: Oh , sorry . Do you know the number for a car store , then ?

speaker: speaker2
text: No . I don't . I suggest you look in the phone book .

speaker: speaker1
text: I'm sorry to have bothered you .
